title: Language Generation Path
description: Build fluency in Language Generation inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Approximate Dynamic Programming (ADP)
steps.summary: ** Approximate Dynamic Programming (ADP) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Start after Dynamic Programming and Dynamic Network Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Aider (CLI code assistant)
steps.summary: ** Aider (CLI code assistant) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Compare it with SWE-bench+ (code agents) and ICD Code Embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Genetic Programming
steps.summary: Genetic Programming belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Start after Genetic algorithm and Genetic Algorithms. It opens into Genetic Programming (GP) and Genetic Programming Rules.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Dynamic Programming
steps.summary: Dynamic Programming belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Start after Dynamic Network Models. It opens into CKY Dynamic Programming and Dynamic Programming-based Search.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Dialogue Management
steps.summary: Dialogue Management belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Start after Dialogue System and Dialogue Systems. It opens into dialogue management agents.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Reinforcement Learning for NLG
steps.summary: Reinforcement Learning for NLG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Generation. Start after Reinforcement Learning and Reinforcement Learning Algorithms. It opens into Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) for NLG.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Genetic Programming (GP)
